items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of the 'Results delivery timeline' feature. While the linked use case mentions that results are available in 5 business days, there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
